vulnerabilities.description: 响应头泄露技术栈: Next.js
响应头泄露服务器信息: istio-envoy
vulnerabilities.remediation: 配置服务器隐藏详细版本信息

vulnerabilities.description: 页面缺少 Clickjacking 防护
vulnerabilities.evidence: 未设置 X-Frame-Options 或 CSP frame-ancestors
vulnerabilities.remediation: 添加 X-Frame-Options: DENY 或 CSP frame-ancestors 指令

vulnerabilities.description: 缺少安全响应头: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Content-Security-Policy, Referrer-Policy
vulnerabilities.evidence: 缺失: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Content-Security-Policy, Referrer-Policy

A weak cipher is defined as an encryption/decryption algorithm that uses a key of insufficient length. Using an insufficient length for a key in an encryption/decryption algorithm opens up the possibility (or probability) that the encryption scheme could be broken.

A weak cipher is defined as an encryption/decryption algorithm that uses a key of insufficient length. Using an insufficient length for a key in an encryption/decryption algorithm opens up the possibility (or probability) that the encryption scheme could be broken.
